The '''Frid''' were an aquatic [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Mackar]]. The Frid relocated to the [[Water/Legends|water]]-covered [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Iskalon/Legends|Iskalon]] to escape a cataclysm that struck Mackar<ref name="gamer1">{{GamerCite|1|The University of Sanbra Guide to Intelligent Life: The Marvel Series}}</ref> around five [[Millennium/Legends|millennia]] before the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]],<ref name="Date">{{CSWECite|II|119|Iskalonian}} states that the [[Species/Legends|species]] constituting the [[Iskalonian]] cultural group were brought to [[Iskalon/Legends|Iskalon]] approximately five [[Millennium/Legends|millennia]] before the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Since "[[The University of Sanbra Guide to Intelligent Life: The Marvel Series]]" establishes that the relocation of the Iskalonian species was prefaced by the cataclysms on the species' original [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworlds]], the cataclysms must also have occurred around that [[Time/Legends|time]].</ref> and became a part of the [[Iskalonian]] [[The School|School]], a cultural group of several aquatic species that had traveled to Iskalon with the aid of [[Unidentified spacefaring benefactors|spacefaring benefactors]].<ref name="gamer1" /> A [[Fish/Legends|fishlike]] species, Frid were characterized by their bulbous [[Color/Legends|violet]] [[Eye/Legends|eyes]], long mouth-flaps and green, scaly skin.<ref name="tegas" /> Frid were sexually dimorphic, as [[Gender/Legends|males]] had fins on their heads which females lacked; they were also incapable of physical speech, instead communicating solely through [[Telepathy/Legends|telepathy]].<ref name="gamer1" /> The Frid were noted for their extreme pacifism, refusing to fight back even when attacked.<ref name="cswe">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref>
